note: Hunt Mobs
guide: For this you'll need a Pocket Black Hole
and a Hunting Axe from the Galatea Quests.

note: Catch pests with traps
guide: The first tier of traps costs 50 Pests
from Pesthunter Philip in the Garden.
You'll also need a Vacuum to collect them.

note: Complete Mining Commissions
guide: For this you'll want to talk to the King
in the Dwarven Mines and do what he tells
you to. Buy yourself better pickaxes from
Bubu to help with this.

note: Collect Tree Gifts
guide: For this you'll want to utilize
Canopy Armor from Amaury in Galatea.
You'll need to contribute at least 10%
to a tree cut to get one.

note: Fish up trash in Backwater Bayou
guide: For this you'll need to apply the Junk Sinker
from Junker Joel in the Backwater Bayou to
your rod and fish with it.

note: Enter Combat in the Colosseum
guide: For this you'll want to
fish up a Sea Creature in a pond
there and kill it.

note: Place all 5 Husbandry Minions
guide: This needs a t1 minion each of:
Pig, Cow, Chicken, Sheep and Rabbit.
Place them down on your island.

note: Hit 1 correct note on Hymn to the Joy
guide: For this you'll need to reach the Acacia Area
in Park. Once you hit a correct note on
Hymn to the Joy in Melodys Harp stop hitting any notes.

note: Reach the Jade Dragon's Lair
guide: For this you'll need Galatea access
(Foraging 12), HOTF 4, Snorkeling Armor
and 1.3m whispers.

note: Receive an Abiphone call in Wilderness
guide: For this you'll want to add either
Elizabeth, Taylor or Agatha and then
run /warp da immediately.

note: Wear 4 armor pieces from different rarities
guide: Ideally you'd wanna use
a common, an uncommon,
a rare and an epic piece.

note: Talk to the Wizard in The Hub, The Rift, and The Garden
guide: This requires SkyBlock Level 12, Garden 3
and luck with getting the visitor :)
Try to unlock as few visitors as possible
before you get him in your Garden.

note: Drop an Eternal Flame Ring in its structure
guide: For this you'll need HOTM 4 and Fishing 19
to fish up Flaming Worms. You'll then need
a specific location to drop the ring in.

note: Unlock 20 different Mobtypes
guide: Don't forget to talk to Ike and Mike
in the Spiders Den to unlock /mobtypes.

note: Kill all 5 Team Treasurite Members
guide: This will also need HOTM 4
and require you to kill everyone
from the Grunt Bestiary and
Boss Corleone.

note: Get killed by an Ent
guide: For this you'll also need Galatea access
and Fishing 12 to be fished up.

note: Kill a Wither type mob with Fall Damage
guide: Ideally you'll want to use
Obsidian Defenders for this.

note: Stare at yourself for 30s in the Mirrorverse
guide: For this you'll need SkyBlock Level 12
and about 11 Minutes of Rift Time
to reach the Mirrorverse.

note: Get 7 different pests in your Garden
guide: This needs either Garden 6 and a
Field Mouse in your Pest Trap or
Garden 7.

note: Hit a Sven Packmaster with a stick
guide: All you need for this is
a t1 and t2 kill of Revenant Horror
and Spider Slayer to then spawn a t1 Sven.

note: Fart at a Star Cult meeting
guide: For this you'll need a Red Nose
to reforge any helmet to Ridiculous
and trigger its ability at a Star Cult Meeting.

note: Drink Tea while wearing a rabbit hat and any tuxedo
guide: For this you'll need 500 Cactus Collection,
Fishing 14 and 3m coins.

note: Get defeated by Rollim and Kaus
guide: For this you'll need Combat 22
and need to do the Faction Quests till
it says 0 Reputation to then swap.

note: Kill a Banshee with a Jukebox
guide: For this you'll need access to
Backwater Bayou and Fishing 10.

note: Talk to Old Man Garry with  Seagull Shard
guide: For this you can either
fuse 5 Bambooleaf Shards with a Chameleon
or craft it from Mangrove Collection 7.
